location: Dropped by the Madding Hand, a hostile NPC (an unmarked optional boss) that patrols south of the Woodland Trail Site of Grace in the Abyssal Woods.
tactics: From the Woodland Trail grace, head south down the path — the Madding Hand is a blindfolded NPC in Gravebird's Blackquill Armor patrolling that stretch, easy to tell apart from other enemies
It has little armor and staggers easily, but its madness-inducing ranged flame attacks can nearly one-shot squishier builds — close the distance fast to shut those down
Don't linger at range trading spells; get in melee range and keep pressure on so it can't reset for another ranged burst
Kill confirms a guaranteed drop of the weapon — no remembrance, trade, or extra steps needed
lore: Stitched from the flayed skin of victims of a mass slaughter, this glove channels that violence into a madness-inducing curse rather than a blade's edge. It's described as a weapon of the downtrodden — born from the unyielding hatred of people once hunted down as heretics by their own kind.

builds.name: Madness proc build
builds.why: Deals a fixed 55 Madness buildup and grants a temporary attack boost whenever madness triggers nearby, stacking with other madness-boost items like Black Dumpling

builds.name: Hybrid caster fist
builds.why: Unusual E-scaling in both Intelligence and Faith alongside D Strength lets it ride along on a caster's stat spread as a status side-tool
